---
title: "About"
image: media/profile.jpg
format:
  html:
    toc: false
about:
  template: solana
  links:
    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/nicholasjohndorsch/
    - icon: github
      text: Github
      href: https://github.com/nick-dorsch
---

#### Background

I come from a geology and geophysics background working in the oil and gas industry, but
over the years have developed a passion for bayesian statistics and data science more
broadly. My skillset includes a mixture of geology and geophysics workflows as well as
more general purpose statistical modelling. The intersection of these things has allowed
me to work on fairly unique projects during my career. 

I believe that bayesian statistical modelling offers the most robust and flexible
framework for uncertainty quantification and decision making under uncertainty. For that
reason it has become a primary career focus of mine.

Effective data analytics require good data practices upstream, so along with my data
science skillset I have developed a focus on relational database design and data
engineering.

---

#### LD Informatics

In 2026, together with my business partner Charlie Lu, I started [LD
Informatics](https://ld-informatics.com/), a consultancy company focussed on developing
data solutions for the energy sector. We specialize in deploying domain driven data
solutions, from cloud infrastructure deployment and database architecture, through to
business intelligence and analytics.

With our combined experience and expertise, Charlie and I represent a full stack data
team.

---

#### Contact information

**based in:** Brisbane, Australia

**availability:** consultancy and contract work

**email:** nicholas.dorsch@ld-informatics.com
